title: Macron Snaps Back at Trump, Reflecting Europe’s Growing Anger Over Iran
summary_full: President Emmanuel Macron of France is among several European officials to speak out about the accumulated effect of President Trump’s criticisms of NATO and his war in Iran.
summary_public: President Emmanuel Macron of France is among several European officials to speak out about the accumulated effect of President Trump’s criticisms of NATO and his war in Iran.
